EmailTemplate.description: Email to use when a customer has let their policy lapse and we want to recontact them.
EmailTemplate.name: Lapsed Renewal_SDR
EmailTemplate.subject: It’s not too late to get a new insurance policy
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Lead.FirstName},
Thank you for previously holding business insurance with Kingsbridge.
It’s not too late to take out a new insurance policy with us - it’s important to note that if you don't have another insurance policy in place, your business may not be covered against claims.
It would only take 5-10 minutes to provide you with a comprehensive quote - book a call with me - https://calendly.com/d/cm3g-k74-js2/kingsbridge-insurance-call-back
Alternatively, you can reply to let me know a good time to call or contact me on 07974533903. Our office is open between the hours of 8:00am-5:30pm, Monday-Friday.
I look forward to hearing from you.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Sales Team
E: salesteam@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808740
